prestazioni: Engine swap to Toyota's *A25A-FXS* (from the RAV4 Prime) with a *Garrett GTX3582R* turbocharger, custom *Perrin Performance* equal-length exhaust manifold, and *Haltech Elite 2500* standalone ECU for precise boost control (targeting 350whp on E85 fuel).

Full *Penske 8760* 3-way adjustable coilovers with *Whiteline* front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and *SPL Parts* front lower control arms for camber adjustment to handle gravel rally stages.
Custom *AP Racing* 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with *DBA 5000 Series* two-piece rotors, paired with *Motul RBF 660* brake fluid for sustained high-temperature performance.
estetica: *Rocket Bunny* widebody kit (Pandem V3) with custom carbon fiber fender flares and *Seibon* carbon fiber hood for weight reduction and aggressive stance.
*Hella* Rallye 3000 Superwhite spotlights mounted on a *Front Runner* roof rack with *PIAA* 520 fog lights integrated into the front bumper for off-road visibility.
*Recaro* SPG XL Rally seats with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses, *Sparco* steering wheel (350mm), and *Defi Advance BF* digital gauges for real-time monitoring of boost, oil pressure, and EGTs.
